base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_raft — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Raft — lets Link cross water at specific docks (pier-tiles). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Raft — lets Link cross water at specific docks (pier-tiles)
